creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Updating Makefile to the new syntax

# svn diff net/rdesktop/
Index: net/rdesktop/Makefile
===================================================================
--- net/rdesktop/Makefile       (revision 329855)
+++ net/rdesktop/Makefile       (working copy)
@@ -12,7 +12,8 @@
 
 LICENSE=       GPLv3
 USE_XORG=      x11
-USE_GMAKE=     yes
+#USE_GMAKE=    yes
+USES=gmake
 USE_OPENSSL=   yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 DOCS=          doc/AUTHORS doc/TODO doc/*.txt
#
